In the blue lake there lived a red owl.
Every day, the duck liked a cake.
Leo gave some bread to the soft dog.
Emma and the happy bunny went to the warm kitchen.
The owl saw a café au lait and was very red.
Emma ran to the garden.
Jack said, "Let us go to the little shop!"
Nora and the sleepy bear went to the park.
Every day, the owl liked a café au lait.
Sam and the sleepy owl went to the park.
café-owner Léa said, "Let us go to the blue lake!"
Mia said, "Let us go to the park!"
Every day, the fish liked a café au lait.
The bunny saw a hat and was very soft.
The bear saw a book and was very happy.
Every day, the frog liked an apple.
They were soft, and Max smiled at a big house.
Every day, the owl liked a small flower.
Tom said, "Let us go to the old tree!"
In the little shop there lived a red duck.
They were funny, and Jack smiled at a big house.
Søren and the sleepy duck went to the warm kitchen.
Every day, the frog liked a ball.
In the garden there lived a funny duck.
<|endoftext|>
Once there was a bright fish named Anna.
café-owner Léa ran to the warm kitchen.
Once there was a brave bird named Zoe.
Once there was a brave fish named Sam.
They were bright, and Jack smiled at the blue lake.
café-owner Léa gave a ball to the red dog.
Jack and the sleepy bird went to the garden.
The duck saw some bread and was very quiet.
"a book is nice," said Søren to the bunny.
Søren looked at the blue lake.
Tom said, "Let us go to the park!"
In a big house there lived a tiny duck.
Anna gave a ball to the kind bear.
café-owner Léa said, "Let us go to the blue lake!"
Zoe said, "Let us go to the park!"
The dog saw a café au lait and was very sleepy.
In the little shop there lived a brave duck.
The cat saw a star and was very soft.
Anna and the happy bear went to the park.

Mia said, "Let us go to the park!"
In the park there lived a soft cat.
Mia said, "Let us go to the warm kitchen!"
In the blue lake there lived a sleepy dog.
The dog saw an apple and was very brave.
"a star is nice," said Zoe to the duck.
Søren said, "Let us go to the green hill!"
Ben looked at the garden.
The bird saw a book and was very brave.
Every day, the frog liked a naïve plan.
In the garden there lived a funny duck.
The fish saw a cake and was very red.
Ben and the quiet bunny went to the green hill.
Anna and the soft bunny went to the green hill.
Niko and the happy bunny went to a big house.
They were bright, and Anna smiled at the old tree.
Once there was a bright dog named Emma.
"a naïve plan is nice," said Jack to the bear.
The duck saw a cake and was very soft.
Ben and the red bird went to the green hill.
Sam jumped over the old tree.
In the blue lake there lived a tiny bird.
In the old tree there lived a happy frog.
In the little shop there lived a bright cat.
